college_info.college_name: Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The TG EAPCET 2026 registration has commenced for Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy admission to BPharma and BE/BTech courses. The deadline to register without a late fee is Apr 4, 2026. The entrance exam for BPharm is scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, while the BE/BTech exam will be held from May 9 to May 11, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: How can I get into Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
M.Pharma Candidate must have completed B.Pharma. or its equivalent degree from a recognised university. Candidate must have secured 50% marks in group subjects taken together in the qualifying examination (45% for reserved category).
B.Pharma Candidates must have completed 16 years of Age by the date of commencement of Admissions or on such other date as may be notified by the CET Committee. There is no upper age limit.

faqs.question: How is the faculty at Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy?
faqs.answer: Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy has been rated 4.3 for faculty as per reviews by students. This shows that Institute has qualified and experienced faculty members.

placements.overview:
UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 84 students were admitted at Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy and 71 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 71 students 30 were placed with median salary of INR 260000 and 40 students opted for higher studies. A total of 100 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacyand 85 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 85 students 22 were placed with median salary of INR 380000 and 60 students opted for higher studies.

PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 39 students were admitted at Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy and 39 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 39 students 34 were placed with median salary of INR 360000 and 3 students opted for higher studies. A total of 38 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacyand 34 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 34 students 28 were placed with median salary of INR 380000 and 3 students opted for higher studies.

faqs.answer: A:    As per information available, Institute offers (aprx) INR 225,000 median salary to their students for B.Pharma course during placements.
faqs.question: What is the median package of B.Pharma course available at Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy?

faqs.answer: A:    Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy offers median package range of (aprx)INR 243,750 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance program as well. Additionally, it has been rated 3.2 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.

faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy for all courses together?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Pharma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Pharma. The fee structure for the Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy programmes is around INR 2,20,000 to 2,60,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: No placements; they should not play with the students' futures.

review_content.Placements: No placements at all. At the beginning, they advertised full placements and a 100% placement guarantee, but our batch ended up without a single placement. They took us to walk-in interviews for the most poorly reputed companies. They only focus on completing the semester syllabus and not on students' careers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but they only focus on getting good grades in semester exams, not at all on students' futures, by sending us to poorly reputed and low-paying companies.
review_content.Faculty: All they want is attendance. They only focus on getting good grades in semester exams and not at all on students' futures. No placements at all. At the beginning, they advertised full placements and a 100% placement guarantee, but our batch ended up without a single placement, and they took us to walk-in interviews for the most poorly reputed companies.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: A Deep Dive into [GRCP]: Academic Excellence.

review_content.Placements: The highest package for B.Pharmacy was nearly 6 LPA, and the lowest was nearly 2-3 LPA, so it's really tough competition to get into B.Pharmacy. The top recruitment companies include Reddy's Lab and Apollo. Nearly 50% of students have received internships, with top roles being general manager, and many students have joined the office by now.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are really good, with Wi-Fi available on every floor and in the labs. All classrooms have perfect infrastructure, and the library is really good, with all the books available at all times. I was not in the hostel, but as my friends stayed there, I learned that everything in the hostel is good, including food and rooms.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: the college experience was good

review_content.Placements: I have studied in Gokaraju Rangaraju college of pharmacy for 4 years and many of my friends have been placed in different companies and the overall experience was very good as i enjoyed being in the college. The sports, dances, seminars, events, presentations, plant programs everything was good.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a good wifi there and also the labs are with the most advanced instruments and safety measures i liked it very much. As i was a non hostler i really don't know about the hostel. I think it was even very good for hostlers with affordable price, it was good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Grcp review about gokaraju rangaraju college of pharmacy .

review_content.Placements: There are no such good placements for the B.Pharma students but the placements for the MPHARM students is good, and many other companies also offer jobs and many students prefer higher studies than placing in a job Right now, different companies come to offer jobs .
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are well-equipped with all the facilities required; one can do experimentation with the required instruments, and the classroom will also be cleaned. Sports are also available every Saturday of the week, and the library is also equipped with books.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college infrastructure, faculty members, and facilities are good.

review_content.Placements: Placements start in the 7th and 8th semesters. Our college placements are excellent. The salary package offered is 2 LPA to 3 LPA. Placement guidance is provided beforehand.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is excellent. All labs are well-equipped. The library is arranged with all types of books needed. The hostel for girls is available with good facilities and a canteen facility is available. For a reasonable fee, the bus service is available in all areas.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are well-qualified and very helpful. Their teaching quality is good. The course curriculum is relevant and sports are conducted. The pass percentage is good. Proper guidance from teachers aids students in all examinations.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It's one of the best college for pharmacy in Telangana. I will 100% recommend you.

review_content.Placements: Every year nearly 100 students are taken in for pharmacy. You get to pay 10-25k during placements based on your knowledge and experience. Top recruiting companies include dr-reddy's lab laurus labs, Mylan lab, aurobindo etc. Top roles offer include quality control, pharmacist, lab technician etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very good infrastructure. We have high-speed Wi-Fi, our labs are well-equipped and very clean, our classrooms are big with lot of space, we have good library with hundreds of books to read. College hostel is only for girls, there is no college hostel for boys, we have a medical room with good practitioner with beds to sleep and medicines etc. We have cricket court, badminton court, horse, room for indoor games and lot.

fees_overview.description: Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy courses are offered to candidates for different course fees. The fee for the courses offered varies between INR 2,20,000 - 2,60,000. These fee components can either be refundable or non-refundable. Candidates who are shortlisted through the Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy admission process must pay the course fee to secure their seat.

description: What's new at Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy cut off 2023? TS EAMCET Seat Allotment results for Phase 1 are out. To download the allotment order, candidates must login at the official website of TS EAMCET at tseamcet.nic.in. The last date for payment of tuition fees and self-reporting through the website is Jul 22. More insights on Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy cutoff 2023, are mentioned below:
TS EAMCET Phase 2 Counselling 2023 process is to be held from Jul 24 to Aug 2.

Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) has released TS EAMCET Phase 1 Counselling results. Gokaraju Rangaraju College of Pharmacy admission 2023 to the BTech course is done through TS EAMCET exam followed by TS EAMCET 2023 Counselling which is to be conducted in three phases namely, Phase 1, Phase 2 and Final Phase. Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges. Candidates can check the ranks for TS EAMCET cutoff for Phase 1 Seat Allotment in this sectio

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good compared to other pharmacy colleges in Hyderabad. Facilities like free Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, excellent library with many books, and spacious labs are available in the college. Food provided in our canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college, and I'd recommend it to others.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is on a high-end. We had Wi-Fi connections and a well-established library. Especially the lab infrastructure was pretty expensive, and there was amazing stuff for students. The labs were super neat, and the glassware was also sufficient for all the students. We had medical assistance immediately whenever we had any requirements.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides very good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and surroundings of our college were very good. Wi-Fi, huge classrooms, and a library with various types of books were available. Library in-charge was great.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for studies, good placements, and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was available. Our college had good infrastructure. The food served in the hostel was good. The canteen was available on campus. Our college offered many courses and good facilities like transportation and a hostel for non-local students. Labs were good to do practicals and to study many things related to subjects.

content.Placements: Placement means in MBBS it is not like that placement system means everyone should do 1-year internship after 4.5 years of the course. The stipend to receive during internships for our college is not much clear now because the reason is the college is new and no batch is passout. All batches are in purchasing stage.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities Wi-Fi is available both in college and in hostel but network problem occurs for 3-4 days every month but the speed is good for the rest of the time. Mess food is average but good compared to mess food of other colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placements, but needs stronger industry exposure.

review_content.Placements: Placement percentage is 75%. The highest package is 9.50 LPA. Average package is 4.50 LPA. Top recruiters (CSE) are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Chegg India, and BYJU's. 70% of students got internships in companies like IBM and Wipro. Top roles offered are software engineer/developer, system engineer, programmer analyst, project engineer, and cloud engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has full campus Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, more than 20 labs, 30,000+ books in library, and digital access. It has well-equipped mechanical shops, seminar halls, and 2000-seats auditorium. Separate hostels are available for boys and girls (AC/non-AC), furnished rooms, Wi-Fi, gym, good electricity/water. Mess and canteen food quality is average but hygienic. Canteen is available for variety. We have on-campus clinic, 24X7 ambulance, and tie-ups with nearby hospitals. It has courts (basketball, volleyball, badminton, tennis), gym, and indoor games. There are more than 20 extra buses for transport.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: An average engineering college.

review_content.Placements: I am from the B.Tech CSE batch (2022-26) with about 120 students. In our senior batch 72 percent students got placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA and the average was 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Cognizant, Accenture and Tech Mahindra along with a few startups. 65 percent secured internships through campus or off-campus drives in companies like Infosys, Wipro and tech startups focusing on software and web/app development. Common roles offered were software engineer, associate engineer, system analyst, QA engineer, and data analyst.

content.Placements: UCER Greater Noida (CSE) records 70-80% placements with an average package of 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The highest package reached 56 LPA (Amazon). Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, Deloitte, and Amazon, offering roles like software developer, data analyst, and QA engineer.
content.Infrastructure: CSE department has Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a central library with digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent with furnished rooms, medical support, sports facilities, and canteen/mess food of average but manageable quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of United College of Engineering and Research.

content.Placements: I am a CSE student, and I guess approximately 60-70% of students got placement in the CS and IT sector. The highest package is 9.5 LPA at Infosys, and the lowest package is 3.25 LPA at HCL Tech. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Accenture, HCL Tech, etc., visit our campus for placements. Roles offered are DSE, SP, and SE at Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Most of the classrooms in our college consist of AC and projectors, which are used by our professors for the purpose of teaching. Our college consist of one of the biggest libraries in the state. The quality of facilities in hostel is average, and the quality of food is also average. Food is provided on a weekly basis, with different food on different days.

Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 541927 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 691454 in 2023.

United College of Engineering and Research, United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. reviews.review_heading: UCER - United College of Engineering and Research.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a great infrastructure and a huge land area. The area where it is situated is some how busy and have some trees. Every classroom have AC and a projector facility that makes it easier and comfortable for students to focus on their studies.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with normal placement.

There is a sports ground and other areas for badminton, basketball, and volleyball area and sports tournaments within the campus happen every year. It also includes that the campus consists of a digital lab equipped with Wi-Fi, computers, and a smart board for a better and practical learning experience. Although the hostel is within the campus but it is handled by Royal Parad...

reviews.review_heading: Good college located in the Knowledge Park 3 area.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. The college has two big sports grounds, a badminton court, a basketball court, and a volleyball court. Sports activities are conducted regularly, and many other events are also organized in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with my college because I have so many expectations, but I did not found.
reviews.review_text: The ground area covers more than 150 acres. The campus is good but not exceptional. The classrooms are not very good. I rate the college canteen 7 out of 10., and the hostel mess is 6 out of 10. Hostel security is good, and the rooms are also good, but the mess is below my expectations.

reviews.review_heading: Supportive and knowledgeable faculty attractive infrastructure better placement .
reviews.review_text: The college has attractive infrastructure with a sports complex, a music area, and a huge central library. Air-conditioned classrooms and labs are there. Every department is equipped with the proper instruments and machines required. The library contains a variety of books. There is a good place to study. There are fully equipped tools. The hostel is well-furnished with Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college from my experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is beautiful. It is an incredible and beautiful place. The faculty members' behaviour is also good. It is the best option for B.Tech. Wi-Fi is always working. There are big classrooms. One class has 60 students. There is a good and knowledgeable environment in the library. It is perfect.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Detailed review of MBBS course at Government Medical College Faizabad.

review_content.Placements: The college offers the prestigious degree of graduate in medicine and surgery, i.e., MBBS. The college provides a compulsory internship of 1 year to enrolled students. The stipend offered is the same as that provided by the state government of Uttar Pradesh to all the government medical colleges in the state. The passing rate of medical graduates from this college is 99%.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is well-equipped with a central library embodying medical books of the latest edition, Wi-Fi service, and an air-conditioned hall. The laboratories are well-equipped with necessary materials for the course. The lecture theatres are well-lit, have modern furniture, are air-conditioned, and have projectors and speakers for teaching purposes. The hostels provide dual-sharing rooms to students on campus, which include furniture as well. Each floor has a decent number of common washrooms and bathrooms that are cleaned regularly. The mess food is of average quality but healthy enough. The canteen provides basic necessities. For sports, there is a cricket ground, badminton court, table tennis, volleyball, and a football ground.

review_content.General: The campus is huge and doesn't provide a lot of facilities. There is no source of water supply anywhere in our college. Even after complaining to the administration many times, there are no water coolers even in the hostels. The food served in the hostel mess is pathetic. In small rooms, 3 roommates have to adjust. The canteen is also not much good. The only good thing on our campus is our library and the greenery. The office management is very egoistic and never completes their work on time and always blames students. They are very rude and ask for bribes.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Totally impressed with the course and college.

review_content.Placements: About all of the students get placed or they prepare for PG entrance and may do the medical officer job the salary of which may vary from 50000-70000 per month. Medical officer or housemenship could be offered as the students pass out also offers the programme of internship throughout the campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus has very enthusiastic environment. It is full of gardens and cleanliness all the facilities including Wi-Fi is provided in college building has a wide collection of medical books and has a very good conditioned library with facility of air conditioning.

review_content.Placements: Campus placements are not applicable for MBBS course. Students prefer to be self employed or apply for higher studies. Continuing practice is more important than joining any well known firm/hospital. College students also join colleges as teaching faculty to guide future aspirants.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus infrastructure and facilities are good and up to the mark. Wi-Fi and LAN were not available during the 2014 batch but library and labs were very well-equipped. Classrooms and complete campus was kept neat and clean. Hostel facility was average but clean. Medical facilities were provided with staff all the time.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure and faculty members but egoistic administration and a pathetic hostel.

content.Placements: As it is a medical college, it is difficult for students to get a seat in 1st attempt in PG. Yet an average number of students have attained one this year. Almost 15% of students have received a PG seat this year. MBBS is a very demanding course. Our 1 batch consists of 150 students, out of which 15% of seats are filled by management through donations.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is huge and doesn't provide a lot of facilities. There is no source of water supply anywhere in our college. Even after complaining to the administration many times, there are no water coolers even in the hostels. The food served in the hostel mess is pathetic. In small rooms, 3 roommates have to adjust. The canteen is also not much good. The only good thing on our campus is our library and the greenery. The office management is very egoistic and never completes their work on time and always blames students. They are very rude and ask for bribes.

review_summary.college_name: Aditya Dental College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am not happy with the college infrastructure, discipline, water supply, cleanliness, etc.

content.Placements: A total of 100 students were placed in our class. Now in our third year, we have 61 students. No packages were offered to our college. No companies are connected to colleges; we have to do it on our own. We have to open our own clinic and earn money through it. And our college fees are INR 2 Lacs for SC, and books are so costly.
content.Infrastructure: The library is present. Large classrooms are present, which can accommodate 100 students at a time. We stay in a PG. Messes are also costly without green and leafy vegetables. No cleanliness, no water supply, no inverter, and no sports are conducted. Extra money is taken from the students.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, but some other issues are there.

content.Placements: 100 students were placed. Students faced other problems due to their strength. We don't have good classrooms. The projectors were not working well. We have to face that problem. Those are the most important factors for the college. Otherwise, the college is good.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is good. Water and light problems occur. Some other issues were there, like hot water not being there and snakes coming at night, which is dangerous. We suffer too many problems in the summer when water problems occur. Trees cast good shadows, which is nice of trees. The water problems need to be solved.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a self depended college.

content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in this course. Many students got internships in this course. Patient flow is not good. We can learn many things in this college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities here are not good. Hostel facilities are average. There is no drinking water facility. The electricity facility is also not good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good. They are knowledgeable. The teaching quality is average. We have to study ourselves for better results. The course curriculum is relevant.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Aditya Dental College is the best college that teaches self-dependency.

content.Placements: Self-employment is the best option after graduation. You can even opt for higher studies like MS or go for government jobs or even have to give competitive exams to work in a medical hospital. The minimum amount paid is approximately Rs.15,000.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is average, and the hostel infrastructure is quite adjustable. The only thing that needs to be done is paint the building. Classrooms are provided with projectors, which makes learning easy. Mess food is good.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college gives good college life.

content.Placements: College provides high job chances and can go for higher studies like pursuing MS or even set up your clinics. Around 50 to 60 interns are placed every year but a stipend is not offered. There are great career opportunities once you enter the outside world.
content.Infrastructure: There are proper departments and well-maintained dental chairs. Library is well stocked with recent editions. Hostel buildings are old and not properly painted so it looks a bit unimpressive but is cleaned regularly these days.

paragraphs: Aditya Dental College admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. reviews.review_heading: I am not happy with the college infrastructure, discipline, water supply, cleanliness, etc.
reviews.review_text:
The library is present.
Large classrooms are present, which can accommodate 100 students at a time.
We stay in a PG.
Messes are also costly without green and leafy vegetables.
No cleanliness, no water supply, no inverter, and no sports are conducted.
Extra money is taken from the students.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, but some other issues are there.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good. Water and light problems occur. Some other issues were there, like hot water not being there and snakes coming at night, which is dangerous. We suffer too many problems in the summer when water problems occur. Trees cast good shadows, which is nice of trees. The water problems need to be solved.

reviews.review_heading: It is a self depended college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities here are not good. Hostel facilities are average. There is no drinking water facility. The electricity facility is also not good.

reviews.review_heading: Aditya Dental College is the best college that teaches self-dependency.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is average, and the hostel infrastructure is quite adjustable. The only thing that needs to be done is paint the building. Classrooms are provided with projectors, which makes learning easy. Mess food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives good college life.
reviews.review_text: There are proper departments and well-maintained dental chairs. Library is well stocked with recent editions. Hostel buildings are old and not properly painted so it looks a bit unimpressive but is cleaned regularly these days.

reviews.review_heading: Aditya Dental College is the best in terms of education.
reviews.review_text: Buildings are good, but maintenance is not proper. The campus is clean and green. The college is in the outskirts. The campus is huge and has greenery. It has a great atmosphere and good climatic conditions.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is developing every day.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. Half of the building is still under construction. Projectors are available in all classrooms. Mess facility is comparatively good. The hostel area is clean and green. A clean drinking water plant is next to the hostel building.

reviews.review_heading: The fee structure is high, and the education quality is poor.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite adjustable, and the main requirements of dental chairs are fulfilled. The patient flow is good. I hate the hostel infrastructure, and they recently cut out the geyser connection too. 4 girls stay in a single room, which makes the room quite crowded because of the small area.

reviews.review_heading: I am extremely satisfied with good teaching and very good practicals.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good with study points and a special library with in-built Wi-Fi. The infrastructure of the college is good with proper hygiene. One of the best points of the hostel is it is properly hygienic with proper washroom which is regularly cleaned by their staff. Staff members are very well behaved.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya Dental College.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of our college is good, and it has about 40 to 50 rooms. In every room, 3 members are allotted. The hostel provides separate beds for each candidate. They have a common bathroom and one bathroom for 3 girls. Girls have to clean their own rooms and bathrooms.

reviews.review_heading: This college has very much disappointed a lot of students.
reviews.review_text: There are no good facilities in our college or any department. No good classrooms are provided to us. We even have blackboards in our classroom. We don't have a working dental chair, and we often don't have electricity while treating patients. Due to this, we have to face a lot of problems when treating patients.

reviews.review_heading: I really do not recommend any of my friend to come to this college.
reviews.review_text: There are no good classrooms, and the infrastructure is not at all good. Even the benches we sit on are not good. There is no Wi-Fi in the college, and even the labs are not that developed. No silence is maintained in the library. Though there is a librarian at our college, he is never concerned about students creating chaos.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya Dental College.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Labs and classrooms are average. Classrooms are equipped with projectors. The library has many books. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Industry ready students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has student friendly campus. Facilities like E-learning and library are available here. The classroom and labs are well-managed and equipped. The hostel is present inside the campus which makes sure of students' safety. The college and hostel campus is clean and green.

reviews.review_heading: The best place to learn with self-sufficiency.
reviews.review_text: There are 8 departments, corresponding to 8 subjects. Each department has 2 HODs and 1-3 staff members. Its infrastructure is also appreciative, which includes many projects and 3D models for particular exam topics. The hostel is very good for living with all its facilities.

reviews_list.review_title: SVKM's Institute of Pharmacy is a brand in India because of its campus and faculty. Visit to college

review_content.Placements: Above 70% in MHT CET is mandatory for admission at SVKM's Institute of Pharmacy. The college has placements in companies like Zydus provides a package of 4 LPA. After B.Pharma, we have to score well in GPAT to get eligible for M.Pharmacy. The college has a good environment with experienced faculty.
review_content.Infrastructure: All teachers are experienced. They have more than 7 years of experience. They completed their Ph.D. from Niper College. The infrastructure of SVKM's in India is the same. There is a 24/7 Wi-Fi connection. The library has fiction and reference books. We have pharmacopoeia with original and Xerox. A hostel is also available on the campus. A central canteen is there. All types of cultural events occur including fiesta, sports day, and all.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: MY college provide good facilities and good infrastructure with good placement offer .

review_content.Placements: Almost 80-85% of students were placed in our course Our college provide maximum 5 Lacs and minimum 2 Lacs package Alembic, Cognizant Apollo TCS are some top recruiting compony Maximum 80% of students get internship in TCS COlognizant Various roles provided in this course .
review_content.Infrastructure: There are two departments present in our college mainly B pahrmacy and D pharmacy The entire Infrastructure is well established and properly maintained All classrooms and labs provided with Wi-Fi facilities There are Physical Library and E Library present in our college Hostel has good facility for stay and good services provided .

faqs.answer: SVKM's Institute of Pharmacy, Dhule has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.PharmaCandidate must have studied Physics and Chemistry as compulsory subjects along with one of the Mathematics/Biology subjects with above mentioned marks in the above subjects taken together from any recognised Board/Council. The mentioned marks of SC/ST and OBC is for the candidate belonging to maharashtra State. Candidates who are appearing at the qualifying examination are also eligible. Maharashtra State candidates must have to appear for MHTCET. All India Candidates need to appear for MHTCET/NEET. However, preference shall be given to the candidate obtaining non zero positive score in NEET over the candidates who obtained non zero score in MHTCET.D.PharmaCandidate passed 10+2 (science stream) with Physics, Chemistry and Biology or Mathematics or Any other qualification approved by the Pharmacy Council of India from any recognised institute/board are eligible to applyM.PharmaFor sponsored candidates, minimum of two years of fulltime work experience in a registered firm/ company/industry/ educational and/ or research institute/ any Government Department or Government Autonomous Organization in the relevant field in which admission is being sought.

faqs.answer: A:    Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital has received an impressive review rating of 3 on Placements based on 3 feedback of verified Shiksha students.
faqs.question: Does Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as MBBS. Whereas, at PG level, Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital offers courses such as MD and MS. Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital fee structure for all the courses is around INR 74,354.

faqs.answer: A:    Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital has course specializations in Anesthesiology, General Medicine, Obstetrics & Gynecology, Emergency Medicine.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital?

review_content.General: Classrooms will be clean and neat. There will be adequate facilities needed for a student. But you should not expect facilities like AC and others because since it is a government college, you cannot expect that kind of facilities. There will be Wi-Fi in the hostel, but in the classroom, Wi-Fi facilities are not provided. A common library is present for both boys and girls. Professors will also use that library. All kinds of books, both Indian authors and foreign authors books, will be there in n the library. There will be adequate facilities in the hostel. Mess food will be quiet. Everyday non-veg will be provided as extra except for Friday. Coffee, tea, and milk will be provided in the morning and evening. Snacks will be provided in the evening. Since it is a medical college, a hospital will be nearby. Sports are given importance in our college. Sports such as football, volleyball, basketball, and cricket are given importance.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Anesthesiology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Evaluation of the Government Medical College and Hospital in Sivagangai.

review_content.Placements: Students at GSMCH have excellent placement options. Students must serve in rural areas for a few years after completing the MD program. Community involvement and real-world experience are highly valued at the college. An internship is required after the MD Anesthesiology course. The internship offers a very good stipend.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has excellent facilities for all of its offerings. Almost four to five rooms have one wireless outlet. Though certain rooms may require three students to reside there, overall, the experience is positive. Each room is designed to accommodate three individuals. Perhaps the kids from North India don't enjoy the food in the mess. The canteen is mediocre. There is access to most sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is small with few facilities.

review_content.Placements: Placements after the MBBS course are possible but everyone prepares for NEET PG. After MBBS you can easily get jobs in private hospitals. The average salary offered ranges between Rs 50,000 - Rs 60,000 per month. Placements are not offered in this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are minimal. The infrastructure is average. Classrooms are like small coaching centers. Playground is very small. Wi-Fi is available in our hostels. Practical lab is of a very low level. In the library, only fans are available. The library remains open from 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Boys are not allowed. Games are not conducted in this college.

individual_reviews.title: Good facilities and clinical exposure.

content.Placements: Since it is government college and medical field, they do not offer placement. There is 1 year internship, after that you can practice anywhere, whereever you want, but you have to register with medical council and get registration number for practice. After getting registration number you can practice anywhere in india.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good with good lab facilities and good library facility with AC. Hostel and mess are good. Three students share one room, with Wi-Fi facility. Rooms are spacious, occupied with tables and chairs, study room is available in hostel equipped with Wi-Fi and tables.

In our college, currently interns are paid 25000 monthly.

There will be Wi-Fi in the hostel, but in the classroom, Wi-Fi facilities are not provided. A common library is present for both boys and girls. Professors will also use that library. All kinds of books, both Indian authors and foreign authors books, will be there in ...

reviews.review_heading: Evaluation of the Government Medical College and Hospital in Sivagangai.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent facilities for all of its offerings. Almost four to five rooms have one wireless outlet. Though certain rooms may require three students to reside there, overall, the experience is positive. Each room is designed to accommodate three individuals. Perhaps the kids from North India don't enjoy the food in the mess. The canteen is mediocre. There is access to most sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is small with few facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are minimal. The infrastructure is average. Classrooms are like small coaching centers. Playground is very small. Wi-Fi is available in our hostels. Practical lab is of a very low level. In the library, only fans are available. The library remains open from 8:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Boys are not allowed. Games are not conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Government Sivagangai Medical College And Hospital.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life is good for all students, but for Tamil students, ragging is here. The food served in the hostel is very good. The hostel provides chapatis. Seniors are supportive. The hostel has workers who wash clothes. We have to pay for it. I would suggest joining this hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and moderate infrastructure, but it is in a rural area.
reviews.review_text: All required facilities are available with proper labs for each department. The building might be a little old. Currently, expansion is going on. Our mess is not very big or good. The food is just average. Sports and cultural activities take place throughout the year. However, there is not much outside the college, so entertainment is less.

reviews.review_heading: For North Indian students It will be very hard to learn the language and will miss out.
reviews.review_text:
All the facilities that the college offers are really good 
There is 1 wifi router for nearly 4, 5 room
Each room is made for 3 people , in some rooms 3 student might be forced to live but over all the experience is good
The Mess food may not be liked by the north indian students.
The canteen is average 
Most of the sports and games are available

college_info.college_name: PGP College of Pharmaceutical Science and Research: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Founded in 2007, PGP College of Pharmaceutical Science and Research is a private institute. It is located in Namakkal, Tamil Nadu. The institute is accredited with AICTE and PCI. PGP College of Pharmaceutical Science and Research provides UG, PG and Doctorate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 7 courses across specialisations such as Emergency Medical Technology and Pharmaceutical. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.Sc., B.Pharma, M.Pharma, D.Pharma and Pharm.D. PGP College of Pharmaceutical Science and Research fees ranges between INR 90,000 to 1,12,000. The student intake for these courses is 202. PGP College of Pharmaceutical Science and Research offers these course across fields such as Medicine & Health Sciences. PGP College of Pharmaceutical Science and Research offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely nothing at the college, my opinion not joining this college.

review_content.Placements: You had 50% of the mark, you should get the course. Did not provide placements in college. They provided 3-month hospital training. My personal opinion did not study this course, particularly at this college. They pay extra money for fines. Simply nothing was in the college, don't join this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall, they had average infrastructure but your department had nothing. They had an empty playground. They provided a bad atmosphere like they did not have a good bathroom even public toilets were better to this college. Only good main buildings like admission places were good other than they all had bad infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Good college, good infrastructure, good future.

review_content.Placements: 65% of students got placed in my students, the lowest salary is INR 10,000, the highest salary is INR 3,00,000. Industrial companies and pharmaceutical companies are recruiting companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available. Labs are good, classrooms are good, the library is good. Food quality is average, room, the bathroom is good. Canteen food is a little better, medical facilities are poor, but the ambulance is there for use. Sports and games and all facilities available are good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are very helpful. All are well qualified and experienced and well knowledge staff are available in my college. All teachers are Ph.D. educated. Yes, this course is curriculum relevant, yes students make them industry-ready. All the students get knowledge well.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied because of management.

review_content.Placements: None of the companies visits here for placements, but students get placed through staff members and passed out students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel for both boys and girls is the worst. The cost of food is also high, but they don't provide quality food. The hostel management is the worst and did not favour for students. Even they did not get vacated easily, and if you get vacate at the mid-time, then you have to pay the full amount. The fee charged for this course include laboratories, studies and functions. However, sports are not included in the fee, and the cost of other charges may be high.

college_info.college_name: National Dental College: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Cutoff, Reviews

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for National Dental College admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: National Dental College provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in stream like Medicine & Health Sciences, and have a fee structure of around INR 17,55,000. UG programs include BDS. Further, the PG programs include MDS.

review_content.General: There is no such thing like placement. Internship programs are compulsory to be done in college with proper 365 working days. During the internship period, students are appointed to different branches where they are treated under the guidance of faculty. They are provided a proper wage for this work .
review_content.Infrastructure: We have great infrastructure at our college, with 24/7 Wi-Fi. Well-maintained labs and a large, spacious library are also there. Classrooms are well furnished with smart boards and ACs. It is also spacious, providing seats for approximately 200 students. Since it's a hospital itself, it provides proper medical facilities. The food provided in mess are also good compared to other hostels .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (B.D.S.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: NDC is a good college. I recommend you join here because it will make your dreams come true.

review_content.Placements: About 100 students are doing their internships. Most students either open up their own clinics, work as teachers, or move abroad for further studies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good. The college lacks in the area of food, which can be improved. Other than this, everything is fine. The college area and hospital have good facilities. All the departments and labs are kept neat and clean. We have comfortable benches in the college.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers here are amazing. Everyone is great. We have regular tests given by each subject department. Teachers play a great role in exams, and they do great from their end. The pass percentage of our college is 50%.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (B.D.S.) - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Good college with fully knowledge staff having great infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: There are about 100 students in our batch, all from different states. According to management quota the fee is about 220000. also there are nursing courses and also for MD. The MD faculty also helps us during our labs and guide us for doing all sort of practical work.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is library and classes are on projector with fully furnished labs. In hostel, the quality of food is good with very polite cooking staff and there is also basketball court in college with 2 canteens. Also there is stationary store on there campus. Bus service is also available for day scholars.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Dental Surgery (B.D.S.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The review that you should read.

content.Placements: Our college does not provide placement, but it gives internships in our hospital. After completion of your final year, you have to do an internship for one year. After that, you can start your private clinic, or you can take exams for a government post, or you can also join as in assistant to learn work in a private dental clinic.
content.Infrastructure: There are various facilities available in every lecture theatre, for example, a projector and air conditioning. We also have a library in which you can borrow boxes related to the course. There is Wi-Fi available on every floor. The food at the hostel I will say it is broken, not very good. Neither is so bad. We also have two canteens. We have a medical hospital, so there are good facilities. There is a crown and a basketball court.

description: National Dental College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 945695 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

National Dental College BDS cutoff 2025 was 945695 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 889143 for admission to the BDS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

National Dental College cutoff 2024 was released throughout a few rounds for different categories of students belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff list was released based on the NEET PG rank, choice declared, availability of seats in college and course, and reservation factors. For MDS admission, the last round closing ranks varied between 3169 and 16694 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. reviews.review_heading: The review that you should read.
reviews.review_text: There are various facilities available in every lecture theatre, for example, a projector and air conditioning. We also have a library in which you can borrow boxes related to the course. There is Wi-Fi available on every floor. The food at the hostel I will say it is broken, not very good. Neither is so bad. We also have two canteens. We have a medical hospital, so there are good facilities. There is a crown and a basketball court.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is really good, but not that good placements. Nice infrastructure in the hostel.
reviews.review_text:
We have great infrastructure at our college, with 24/7 Wi-Fi. 
Well-maintained labs and a large, spacious library are also there.
Classrooms are well furnished with smart boards and ACs.
It is also spacious, providing seats for approximately 200 students. 
Since it's a hospital itself, it provides proper medical facilities. 
The food provided in mess are also good compared to other hostels
.

reviews.review_heading: NDC is a good college. I recommend you join here because it will make your dreams come true.
reviews.review_text: Everything is good. The college lacks in the area of food, which can be improved. Other than this, everything is fine. The college area and hospital have good facilities. All the departments and labs are kept neat and clean. We have comfortable benches in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with fully knowledge staff having great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is library and classes are on projector with fully furnished labs. In hostel, the quality of food is good with very polite cooking staff and there is also basketball court in college with 2 canteens. Also there is stationary store on there campus. Bus service is also available for day scholars.

college_info.intro:
SGBAU Amravati popular programmes are BTech and BSc. BTech and BSc students are placed in top companies in top sectors. BTech students are given technical knowledge and are trained in advanced technology. The aim of the university is to build a strong research and teaching environment for students. BTech and BSc students are provided with various facilities such as a Research lab, Computer Science Society, Training and Placement Cell, and others.
Overall, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. BTech students can also go for non-technical fields such as Sales, Marketing, and others. Check out the below video to know more:
Below mentioned are some of the Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University courses and fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Pursuing the BA degree designed by SGBAU provides graduates with a broad career scope. After completion of this programme, BA graduates can pursue different career paths such as Social worker, Teacher, Content Writer, and more. Each career path helps students achieve attractive earnings. Mentioned below is a list of various job profiles for BA degree holders to pursue and their corresponding average salaries:Journalist: INR 3 LPA to INR 5.5 LPATeacher: INR 4 LPA to INR 6.5 lakhHuman Resour
faqs.question: What are the prospects of doing BA from SGBAU?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University does provide placement support to students officially pursuing any programme from the university. For helping the students, the university has established a placement cell. The cell maintains strategic relations with many reputed companies to provide quality on-campus placement opportunities. Apart from this, the placement cell serves as a catalyst for training and skill enhancement of students.
faqs.question: Does SGBAU provide placement support and training to its students?

faqs.answer: A:    As per information collated from official sources, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University offers a BA programme via more than 10 affiliated colleges. Thus, the university boasts a high number of seats for admission to BA courses. Among all the colleges/institutes, Gulamnabi Azhad Arts Commerce College has the highest intake, with 3,480 seats.
faqs.question: Which affiliated college of SGBAU has the highest seat intake for BA course?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the official website of SGBAU, the placement cell of the university maintains good relations with reputed organisations. As per the student reviews, many top recruiters have visited the university's campus for recruiting students enrolled in the BCom programme. Some of the top recruiters sourced from student reviews are TCS, Wipro, AD Electronics, and more.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for BCom programme at SGBAU?

At the UG level, the university offers four-year BTech and various other courses to students. At the PG level, the university provides MCom, MSc, MCA, and other courses to students. The university also provides PhD programmes to students. For the General AI category, the BTech CSE cutoff ranged from 93928 in the round 1 to 412869 in the last round. According to the last round, the most and least competitive college to get admission into was Shri Sant Gajanan Maharaj College of Engineering, Shegaon and Babasaheb Naik College of Engineering, Janata Shikshan Prasarak Mandal, respectively. Please note that the cutoff for other categories will differ accordingly.

individual_reviews.title: I suggest students get admission here.

admission_process.title: SGBAU Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SGBAU admissionto various UG, PG, diploma, certification and PhD courses is through online mode. Interested candidates can apply by filling out the application forms available on the official website. Through its 27 departments of study, the university offers a total of 941 courses in streams likeEngineering, Science, Management, Commerce, Education, Law and Library Information Science.Read the following article to learn about the courses, eligibility, and admission procedure ofSant Gadge Baba Amravati University.

SGBAU course admissionis subject to fulfilment of the course-specific admission criteria. The university offers a wide range of courses across multiple specialisations. Admission to different courses is either based on merit or on the valid scores of national/state-level entrance exams. The university for many courses grants admission through Common Admission Programme (CAP). Check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularSGBAU courses:

The total tuition fee for SGBAU is inclusive of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, medical insurance, security deposit, and more. Some of the components need to be paid only once at the time of admission, while the remaining components are charged either semester-wise/ yearly.SGBAU feeranges betweenINR 4,000andINR 4.6 lakh. Admission to Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University is a multi-step process that involves application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students are required to clear the admission criteria before applying for the programme of choice. The university offers admissions through the Centralised Admission Programme for some of its programmes. Check out the following steps to complete theSGBAU admission process:
Step 1: SGBAU Application Process
Visit the official website of the university and apply for the programme of choice. Duly fill in the application form by providing the required details and uploading the specified documents.
Step 2: SGBAU Selection Process

SGBAU shortlists students based on several parameters, such as entrance exam scores, past academic qualifications, etc. Students must appear and clear the course-specific entrance test to be eligible for admission. Seat allotment for certain programmes is done through counselling conducted by the concerned authority.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates must pay the admission fee and go through document verification to secure their spot at the university.

placement_data.title: SGBAU Amravati Placement overview
paragraphs: What’s new at SGBAU placements 2023? SGBAU placement report 2023 is not released. However, according to Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during SGBAU UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 2.11 LPA and INR 2.40 LPA , respectively. Further, a total of 18 students were placed out of 44 students during SGBAU UG 4-year placements 2022.
SGBAU Placements 2022

data: SGBAU Placements 2022 A fall of over 45% was witnessed in the UG 4-year median package offered in 2022 as compared with 2021 A fall of nearly 33% was witnessed in the PG 2-year median package offered in 2022 as compared with 2021

faqs.question: Does SGBAU offer better placements than PKDV?
faqs.answer: The median package offered for SGBAU's UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements in 2022 was INR 2.11 LPA and INR 2.40 LPA, respectively, according to Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University's NIRF report 2023. Additionally, at the SGBAU UG 4-year placements in 2022, a total of 18 students were placed out of 44 students. The largest package (12 LPA) in the placement drive of 2022 was recorded by PDKV Akola. Top employers include Reliance Foundation, Mahindra, IFFCO, Bayer Crop Science, and others. Hence, PKDV has a better placement cell and placement opportunities.

faqs.question: Which affiliated college of Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University has the highest seat intake for BCom?
faqs.answer: As per information sources from official sources, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University has more than 10 affiliated colleges offering the BCom programme. Thus, in total the university has 26,332 seats available for BCom. Among all the colleges/institutes, Shri Mithulalji Kacholiya Commerce And Shri Satyanarayanji Ramkrushnaji Rathi Science College has the highest intake with 1,080 seats.

faqs.question: Does SGBAU provide placement support and training to its students?
faqs.answer: Yes, Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University does provide placement support to students officially pursuing any programme from the university. For helping the students, the university has established a placement cell. The cell maintains strategic relations with many reputed companies to provide quality on-campus placement opportunities. Apart from this, the placement cell serves as a catalyst for training and skill enhancement of students.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters for BCom programme at SGBAU?
faqs.answer: As per the official website of SGBAU, the placement cell of the university maintains good relations with reputed organisations. As per the student reviews, many top recruiters have visited the university's campus for recruiting students enrolled in the BCom programme. Some of the top recruiters sourced from student reviews are TCS, Wipro, AD Electronics, and more.

average_package.title: SGBAU Average Package 2023

faqs.question: Can Dhoot Transmission and Bajaj Electricals be considered as some of the top recruiters of SGBAU?
faqs.answer: Candidates might get respectable placement possibilities at Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University. Campus placement drives are open to students in their final year of study. In addition to placing students, the institution offers internships in a number of companies, such as Dotcom, JK Innovation, Mindspark, Webveer Technology, Maestro, and others. SGBAU placements' salient features include the following: The highest CTC available to applicants is between INR 8 and INR 9 Lacs per annum. While the lowest CTC offered to candidates is approximately INR 2.4 LPA, the average CTC offered to candidates is approximately INR 3 LPA. Among the top employers are Amazon, Backend, Apsara Chemicals, Dhoot Transmission, Bajaj Electricals, and Bigbasket. Among the industries in which students were placed were the automotive, IT, software, transportation, construction, education, and clinical research sectors.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at SGBAU cost?
faqs.answer: SGBAU Amravati has 30 departments that offer certificate, undergraduate, graduate, and PhD level programmes in science, engineering, management, business, education, the arts, law, and lifelong learning. It offers a 2 years MBA programme with specializations in Financial Management, Marketing Management, Human Resources Management, Production and Operations Management. The total fees for the MBA programme at SGBAU is INR 80,600. A bachelor's degree in any field with at least 50% of the required courses completed is required for entrance to the MBA program. You can read more information about the MBA programme at Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University on the following site - https://www.shiksha.com/university/sant-gadge-baba-amravati-university-22416/courses

faqs.question: What is the total tuition fees to pursue BSc from SGBAU?
faqs.answer: Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University BSc fee structure is a composition of multiple fee components. Out of all, one of the prominent fee components is the tuition fees. As per the structure, the total tuition fees for BSc amount to INR 31,600 . Students willing to know the complete fee structure can visit the official website of the university. Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

faqs.question: Which affiliated college of SGBAU Amravati has the highest seat intake for MBA?
faqs.answer: SGBAU Amravati offers an MBA programme via one constituent and four affiliated colleges. Some of the colleges affiliated with the university are PR Patil College of Engineering And Technology (PRPCET), Vidya Prasarini Sabhas Arts, and more. Out of all, Prof. Ram Meghe Institute of Technology and Research offers the highest number of MBA seats, i.e., 120 .

college_info.college_name: SGBAU Scholarship Details

paragraphs: SGBAU Amravati has 30 departments that offer certificate, undergraduate, graduate, and PhD level programmes in science, engineering, management, business, education, the arts, law, and lifelong learning. It offers a 2 years MBA programme with specializations in Financial Management, Marketing Management, Human Resources Management,  Production and Operations Management. The total fees for the MBA programme at SGBAU is INR 80,600. A bachelor's degree in any field with at least 50% of the required courses completed is required for entrance to the MBA program.

You can read more information about the MBA programme at Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University on the following site - https://www.shiksha.com/university/sant-gadge-baba-amravati-university-22416/courses
Yes, the university offers merit-based scholarships to its students.

Sant Gadge Baba Amravati University BSc fee structure is a composition of multiple fee components. Out of all, one of the prominent fee components is the tuition fees. As per the structure, the total tuition fees for BSc amount to INR 31,600. Students willing to know the complete fee structure can visit the official website of the university.
Note: The above-mentioned fee is as per the official sources. However, it is indicative and subject to change.

Yes, students enrolled in the SGBAU Amravati MBA programme are eligible for various national and state-level scholarships offered by the GOI. Some of the national and state-level scholarships available for students to avail include Govt. of India Divyangjan, KIshorVaigyanik, ProtsahanYojana, PG Scholarship for the professional course for SC/ST,  Umbrella Scholarship, and more.

reviews_list.review_title: Best college I have ever seen. The infrastructure is top notch and every teacher is supportive.

review_content.Placements: It is the best college and I am in the 2023 batch, a 1st-year student but through my seniors, I get information that they get a package of 150,000 salary per month of placement and the lowest package is a 60,000 per month package. These are some companies for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and facilities in college are the best I have ever seen. Here you will get every possible facility or here you will see every type of lab or classroom that is big with AC rooms. Another point is that college regularly holds sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Journey of Ayurveda in Ayujyoti Ayurvedic College Sirsa.

review_content.Placements: Our college do not provide any placements for our course. We have to join any hospital for practice and we can also apply for AMO post under government.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and library is also good. The hostel facility is good with all the essential needs. Environment of the college campus is mesmerising and canteen facilities is also good. Every year, there is a sports meet in which different sports events are conducted.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are great, especially in the final year of the course. Teaching quality is also great. The course curriculum is relevant and it prepares students to face the obstacles in treating the patients.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Nice nature of teachers, good infrastructure and herbal plants are available.

review_content.Placements: Good placements are provided in hospitals. The college has a nice area. The highest package is 2 LPA and the lowest is 30k per month. Average is 70k per month. Top roles are of general physician, teacher, doctor, compounder, professor, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Nice and clean infrastructure is available but the canteen is not good. Wi-Fi is not available for students, it is only for teachers. Library has books but they are limited to borrow. Classrooms are clean and the quality of food is average. Functions happen in this college and medical facilities are average.

individual_reviews.title: Nice nature of teachers, good infrastructure and herbal plants are available.

content.Placements: Good placements are provided in hospitals. The college has a nice area. The highest package is 2 LPA and the lowest is 30k per month. Average is 70k per month. Top roles are of general physician, teacher, doctor, compounder, professor, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Nice and clean infrastructure is available but the canteen is not good. Wi-Fi is not available for students, it is only for teachers. Library has books but they are limited to borrow. Classrooms are clean and the quality of food is average. Functions happen in this college and medical facilities are average.

individual_reviews.course: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: BAMS is a professional course so placements are 100% either in government or private bodies. The highest salary package will be according to the knowledge gained by students to attend and diagnose the patient. Top roles are offered after post-graduation.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, Wi-Fi, laboratories, and a library are available. Air-conditioners are not available in classrooms. Hostel facilities are average. All allopathy and ayurvedic books are available in our college library. The canteen is also available but all food items are not available. Sports and games events are also conducted by the management.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Ramdas Khalsa Institute of Science and Technology (GRKIST) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its faculty members that is why I join this college.

content.Placements: In this college, there are 120 students. The students are giving their 100% effort. As for as recruiting companies are concerned near about 50%, and the top recruiting companies are Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, Zyddus, Cadila, etc.
content.Infrastructure: This college has ultimate level for pursuing any degree. If I will look for degree that is pharmacy practicals plays a vast role, for that this college carries every facility. Our college is far from city.
content.Faculty: Teachers are knowledgeable and helpful. As I am belonging from Kashmir which is far from this college but when first visit I visualised the whole scenario I decided to pursue pharmacy from this college. As for as the studies are concerned, it has ultimate level with practicals also.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is good for learning and skills development.

content.Placements: Students are getting jobs with average packages in our course. Many pharmacy companies like Cipla, Dr. Reddy's, etc., visit our college for placements, and these are one of the top 10 pharma companies in India. Students also qualify in competitive exams like GPAT and NIPER.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are above average. I enjoy it very much. It also has a canteen, but the canteen is not that good as it is very far from the city. We have to come by bus by traveling 1 hour to reach college.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good in our college. The learning process is quite entertaining because of practical works as our course is related to chemistry. Teachers are well-educated and skilled. They help us to get knowledge. All things are average. Exams are conducted strictly, and their checking is also strict. Exams are conducted very often, and it also took online recently through a zoom meeting.

About 30-40% of the students got internships. We had nice faculty members who are friendly. They are really helpful to us, and they never give up.

individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty.

content.Placements: Only 20% of the students were placed in our course. The highest average salary offered ranges from Rs. 20,000 to Rs. 30,000 per month. Only a few companies like TCS, Mahindra, etc., are recruiting companies. Only 10% of students got the internship from our course in companies like Maruti, Mahindra etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities of our college are very poor. Infrastructure is good. But lab facility is very disappointing because the instruments are very old and bad in condition. Moreover, it is not working properly, and even some instruments are damaged from years. In the library, books are not available according to subjects, and most of the books are a very old version. In the library, books are never updated according to requirement and according to the new syllabus. The quality of the food is very bad, and most of the time, food is not available in the canteen and hostel facility also disappointed for all the students.

It is preferable to inquire directly the admissions office of GRKIST regarding the rules and procedures for direct admissions.

reviews.review_heading: The best thing that happened to me is GRKIST.

highlights.summary: The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

college_info.intro:
JNTUH College of Engineering comprises several departments, including the Department of Chemical Engineering, Mathematics, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and Metallurgical Engineering and others. Through its departments, JNTUH College of Engineering offers various UG, PG, and PhD courses.
The BTech and MTech programmes offered at the JNTUH College of Engineering are very popular among the students. The institute offers a four-year BTech programme and a two-year MTech programme in numerous specialisations. The popularity of these programmes is attributed to their curriculum, which has been developed and upgraded to enhance the knowledge of students in various branches of engineering and technology. The industry-institute relations established by JNTUH College of Engineering provide students with the opportunity to undergo various training programmes organised by industry partners. JNTUH College of Engineering also offers placement assistance to students and helps them get placed in top companies. The notable JNTUH College of Engineering recruiters include Zomato, Amazon, Microsoft, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, and Google, among others. Check the popular programmes offered at JNTUH College of Engineering, along with their fee structure and eligibility criteria in the following table:

review_content.Placements: Around 80 percent of students get placed in our senior batch. The highest salary package offered is 52 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. There is a university medical centre which will be open on weekdays only.

overview_faqs.question: What is the TS EAMCET Counselling fees?
overview_faqs.answer: TS EAMCET Counselling fee for OBC category candidates is INR 1200 and for Scheduled Caste (SC)/ Scheduled Tribe (ST) Category is INR 600. CMR College of Engineering and Technology admission to the BTech course is done through TS EAMCET exam followed by TS EAMCET Counselling which is to be conducted in three phases namely, Phase 1, Phase 2 and Final Phase. Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges.
