review_summary.college_name: JNTUH College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: The college has good placements, and most of the students with a good CGPA will be placed. Many MNC companies will visit the college since it is a university and a government institution. However, the internship facility is a little bit low as we have to seek it from outside on our own.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the hostel is not that good, but it is worth the hostel fee. The food provided by the hostel is good not that bad but we can get bored with the weekly menu. The food will be good, and the Wi-Fi facility is also available in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: My JNTUH University facts.

content.Placements: A maximum of 70 percent of students are placed in the academic year 2024 to 2025. The highest package is approximately 52 LPA and the lowest is 5 LPA. Most companies that recruit us are like Infosys, Amazon, Microsoft, and AMD. These companies offer a sufficient package.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are clean and have good infrastructure. Hostel food is also good and sports facilities are very good for all types of games.
content.Faculty: Here, all the faculty members are professors, they are well-experienced in their teaching subjects, and they clarify students' doubts. For every semester, we have a semester exam. Exams are a little bit tough because we will study all the chapters from the start. I am joining the electronic and communication engineering branch. The faculty of this branch teaches very well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Nice college for study and enjoyment, with the best faculty.

content.Placements: In Electronics and Communication Engineering, almost 40% students are placed. The highest package is 19LPA. The top recruitment company is Qualcomm. Internships are mostly outsourced. Best placements, nice environment, and the best educational institution.
content.Infrastructure: The library is provided with all the books required for the course. Pleasant environment at the department, Hostels are provided only for students staying far and students with low incomes. Most sports students are encouraged by our college irrespective of categories.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University.

content.Placements: Around 80 percent of students get placed in our senior batch. The highest salary package offered is 52 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. The average package ranges from 7-8 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Oracle, Zeta, etc. The top role offered is SDE. I think our placements are quite good when compared to other colleges of our tier.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are quite normal. We have a projector in every class. We have departmental Wi-Fi, which is working quite well. Our library is a 3-storey building, which is quite huge and has a floor dedicated to the digital library. The hostel is quite average. Mess quality is okay. There is a university medical centre which will be open on weekdays only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with getting into this college.

content.Placements: The main thing I want to share about the JNTUH college is that it will provide us with the best placements compared to other private colleges. Many MNCs will visit the college since it is a government college, and most of the students will be getting placed.
content.Infrastructure: I am a hosteller as compared to an outside hostel. College hostel is far better compared to the monthly mess fee, food, and other activities. All the hostellers must be inside the hostel by 6:00 pm. Everyone from the college will have access to the medical facilities till 5:00 pm.

faqs.question: TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in how many rounds?
faqs.answer: The TS EAMCET Counselling 2025 will be conducted in three phases, namely Phase 1, Phase 2, and the Final Phase, for admission into BE/BTech/BPharma courses by the Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) and will be managed by Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). Further, TS EAMCET (now TS EAPCET) Spot Round will also be conducted for Private Unaided Engineering Colleges.

faqs.question: What is TS EAMCET 2025 Counselling schedule?
faqs.answer: TS EAMCET Counselling process is ongoing. TS EAMCET Seat Allotment results for Phase 1 Counselling are out. To download the allotment order, candidates must login at the official webiste of TS EAMCET at tseamcet.nic.in.To be conducted in three phases TS EAMCET 2025 Phase 2 Counselling process began inJuly, whereas the Final Phase counselling process will beginAugust. Based on the candidate's achieved ranks, TS EAMCET seats are allocated.

description: JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MCA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Admission to various UG and PG courses at JNTUH College of Engineering, Hyderabad, is based on several exams such as TS EAMCET and MBA exams. The institute offers BTech courses based on valid TS EAMCET ranks. JNTUH College of Engineering, Hyderabad, accepts exams along with the courses as follows:

JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 1228 and 27732 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) and B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 1228, 1614 and 2719, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Hyderabad MCA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 616. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 432, and the 2023 cutoff was 314 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MCA has been decreasing in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the hostel is not that good, but it is worth the hostel fee. The food provided by the hostel is good not that bad but we can get bored with the weekly menu. The food will be good, and the Wi-Fi facility is also available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: My JNTUH University facts.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are clean and have good infrastructure. Hostel food is also good and sports facilities are very good for all types of games.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college for study and enjoyment, with the best faculty.
reviews.review_text: The library is provided with all the books required for the course. Pleasant environment at the department, Hostels are provided only for students staying far and students with low incomes. Most sports students are encouraged by our college irrespective of categories.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JNTUH College of Engineering Hyderabad, Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are quite normal. We have a projector in every class. We have departmental Wi-Fi, which is working quite well. Our library is a 3-storey building, which is quite huge and has a floor dedicated to the digital library. The hostel is quite average. Mess quality is okay. There is a university medical centre which will be open on weekdays only.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with getting into this college.
reviews.review_text: I am a hosteller as compared to an outside hostel. College hostel is far better compared to the monthly mess fee, food, and other activities. All the hostellers must be inside the hostel by 6:00 pm. Everyone from the college will have access to the medical facilities till 5:00 pm.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good one for a government college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for our course are above average. Every classroom has projectors for teaching. Every department has seminar halls and laboratories. Every floor has Wi-Fi access. The college has a central university library and another smaller library with proper facilities. The quality of hostel facilities is below average. The food is worst. The college has an indoor stadium, a ground, and other sports courts.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available for every department, and every lab has its own Wi-Fi. Everything is good in this college. Good campus-wide coverage, well-equipped with projectors and computers, large modern libraries accessed digitally, and affordable basic facilities in the hostel! Grounds and equipment for major sports.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with placements and with faculty up to a certain level.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and classrooms are good. We have an excellent university library with a lot of good books, and we even have a small library for general purposes. Our labs are a bit old, but nonetheless, they work very well and satisfy the requirements in most cases. Our department overall looks nice.

reviews.review_heading: Review by the First Batch of Cybersecurity at JNTUH.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are equipped with projectors. There is departmental Wi-Fi. There are many libraries, the main one being the university library, which has 3 floors. The hostel is of moderate quality. The food quality is better than that of other hostels. There is a university healthcare centre.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and peaceful surroundings.
reviews.review_text: The facilities for my course and hostel are quite good. I really like the infrastructure of my college. But it's not modern as it is an old university. The facilities in the hostel are not that great. Classrooms, library, and labs are good enough. The food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Not a great college, but decent.
reviews.review_text: The campus was widely spread along 45 acres of land with many great facilities like separate blocks for different branches of students, AC classrooms, library, free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, placement rooms, auditorium, project labs, lawn, waiting room, indoor complex, etc. The hostel was also excellent in providing quality facilities like good food, clean rooms, and a hygienic environment. The medical team was doing an excellent job. They were available to the students the entire day. The...

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and nice infrastructure and above average facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good facilities and infrastructure are available. In our college in my civil department the nicest facilities are there and good information is given. WI-FI is available in department labs classrooms and two libraries.  Nice food in hostel mess. Canteen and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Inside JNTUH  Education Campus Life and Growth.
reviews.review_text: Moderate infrastructure Wi-Fi labs are good library is extraordinary, classrooms are mid related to the hostel everything is good. Sports and games are super nice and tournaments happen. I really like our university library it has so many facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Love this college. The best college that teaches you life.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good, but the food may be a bit questionable. The infrastructure is good, especially the equipment provided in the laboratories, which is phenomenal. Food is sometimes good, whereas sometimes it is very odd-tasting and of low quality. The canteen needs to be improved a little bit.

reviews.review_heading: Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad.
reviews.review_text: In JNTUH, infrastructure is excellent and it looks like an IT company. Classrooms are very good and clean with wooden benches which are comfortable for students, and every room contains a stage allocated to faculty members.

reviews_list.review_title: It was an average college. If you can't afford another college then choose this college.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements before 2024 but two students were placed with a 1.5 LPA. The teaching experience is too poor because they don't have better faculty staff. Classrooms seem like godowns. There is no maintenance, but the college fee is submissively daytime. I suggest u never be admitted to this college.

reviews_list.review_title: This is the best university in the state of Punjab.

review_content.Placements: This university was the best place for upgrading skills practically as well as theoretically. Most students scored a CGPA above 8. The maximum salary package was approximately 8–10 LPA. Most of students attended internships in different as well as best companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Many facilities were there, such as delicious food with a great seating area, Wi-Fi, electricity, a library with a quiet environment, medical facilities with professional staff, clean surroundings, clean restrooms, sports facilities, and a screen time area also available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University.

review_content.Placements: About 40-50% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like HDFC Bank, DCB Bank, ICICI Bank HCL, TCS, etc., visit our campus for placements. Top roles, like marketing, sales executive, manager and assistant manager, are offered to the students. About 40% of the students got a chance for internships in private banks as a marketing executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is very pleasant. You will be totally safe here, and it gives you a positive vibe to study harder. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are good. Students get a lot of new opportunities every day to develop their skills through extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: A college where you can do anything what you want with no restriction.

review_content.Placements: In my course we have 45 students in the class all the students are very good in coding except some students who does not take class seriously. The average salary is 25000 for month and it will increase as you doing your work well. The recruiting companies are Plasma, hdfc bank and other software development companies. In my university some people are given job by the plasma and other IT companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university campus is very good and all the teachers are very friendly they always take care of their poor students. Wi-Fi is almost free for every student. Students can check what they want to see in the internet either they have no internet connection. The hostel is very neat and clean.

faqs.answer: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University provides very liberal entry, because the majority of its programme follows merit basis and hence it admits students after clearing eligibility conditions for most of the programs; that are undergraduate or postgraduate course. And that candidate requires minimum of 50% aggregate in any previously done qualifying examination, however the entire process to make an application is so straightforward; for which he submits the prescribed online application form. He just needs to make payment as a cost toward form that amounts ?600. Whereas certain colleges require entrance exam scores like CAT/MAT for the MBA, the majority of the seats are simply merit-based, making the entire affair a relatively straightforward affair to get admission, in contrast to more strenuous colleges.
faqs.question: Q: Is it easy to get admission in Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University?

faqs.answer: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University (SGGSWU) accepts all entrance exams to enter the institution for MBA. The main entrance exams accepted are CAT, MAT, CMAT, and XAT. Candidates who have passed any of these entrance exams have priority during the admission procedure. Apart from this, SGGSWU might also consider scores from the entrance tests conducted at state levels. The candidate must score at least 50 percent marks in graduation to become eligible for admission. Entrance Exam: The selection process also includes performance in group discussions and personal interviews after entrance exam scores.

overview_faqs.question: How good is Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University for B.P.Ed?
overview_faqs.answer: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University offers the Bachelor of Physical Education (B.P.Ed) degree with high features for overall academic sessions, with proper training in this sector. This course focuses on helping students to apply for physical education jobs as well as becoming professionals in the field of sports management. SGGSWU hosts robust placement supports from top recruiting companies such as HDFC Bank, Infosys, TCS, Axis Bank, and Nestle. The University focuses on their overall development and provides excellent modern facilities to the students. The main focus is employability and industry connections. Students often strive to join the institution owing to its strong reputation, which prepares them to make the right career choices for a successful future.

review_summary.college_name: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Teachers don't teach. No datesheet provided on time. Only projects files were given to complete.

content.Placements: I think I do not know anyone who got a good package at this university. I took admission here because one of my friends told me that this university is so good and a good placement was got by a lot of people, but that all was false. He also said that we can get placement in Microsoft also.
content.Infrastructure: Our university environment is good. It features a big ground with a lot of greenery and trees everywhere. University's size is quite large, and it even has a temple inside. Computer labs are available, and canteens are also present, where many students gather with their partners.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Chemistry - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: This is the best university in the state of Punjab.

content.Placements: This university was the best place for upgrading skills practically as well as theoretically. Most students scored a CGPA above 8. The maximum salary package was approximately 8–10 LPA. Most of students attended internships in different as well as best companies.
content.Infrastructure: Many facilities were there, such as delicious food with a great seating area, Wi-Fi, electricity, a library with a quiet environment, medical facilities with professional staff, clean surroundings, clean restrooms, sports facilities, and a screen time area also available.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University.

content.Placements: About 40-50% of the students from our course got placed. The highest salary package offered is 20 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies like HDFC Bank, DCB Bank, ICICI Bank HCL, TCS, etc., visit our campus for placements. Top roles, like marketing, sales executive, manager and assistant manager, are offered to the students. About 40% of the students got a chance for internships in private banks as a marketing executive.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is very pleasant. You will be totally safe here, and it gives you a positive vibe to study harder. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are good. Students get a lot of new opportunities every day to develop their skills through extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A college where you can do anything what you want with no restriction.

content.Placements: In my course we have 45 students in the class all the students are very good in coding except some students who does not take class seriously. The average salary is 25000 for month and it will increase as you doing your work well. The recruiting companies are Plasma, hdfc bank and other software development companies. In my university some people are given job by the plasma and other IT companies.
content.Infrastructure: The university campus is very good and all the teachers are very friendly they always take care of their poor students. Wi-Fi is almost free for every student. Students can check what they want to see in the internet either they have no internet connection. The hostel is very neat and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: The college is average in all the aspects.

content.Placements: No placements as were conducted by the university, because we are the first outgoing batch. So there was no placement cell. This university is more towards religious activities not towards study. There is lack of exposure for the students but before taking admission go and check out the place by yourself.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides well-furnished infrastructure. They have invested so much of money towards infrastructure about 400cr. The studies of the college are inadequate. The hostel is excellent like 5-star hotels; you must visit the hostel.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University?
faqs.answer: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University provides very liberal entry, because the majority of its programme follows merit basis and hence it admits students after clearing eligibility conditions for most of the programs; that are undergraduate or postgraduate course. And that candidate requires minimum of 50% aggregate in any previously done qualifying examination, however the entire process to make an application is so straightforward; for which he submits the prescribed online application form. He just needs to make payment as a cost toward form that amounts ?600. Whereas certain colleges require entrance exam scores like CAT/MAT for the MBA, the majority of the seats are simply merit-based, making the entire affair a relatively straightforward affair to get admission, in contrast to more strenuous colleges.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University (SGGSWU) accepts all entrance exams to enter the institution for MBA. The main entrance exams accepted are CAT, MAT, CMAT, and XAT. Candidates who have passed any of these entrance exams have priority during the admission procedure. Apart from this, SGGSWU might also consider scores from the entrance tests conducted at state levels. The candidate must score at least 50 percent marks in graduation to become eligible for admission. Entrance Exam: The selection process also includes performance in group discussions and personal interviews after entrance exam scores.

placement_data.title: SGGSWU Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The University has not released the placement report or brochure for 2023. However, the NIRF report 2023 is out. As per the report, 4 UG (4-year) and 27 PG (2-year) students were placed in 2022. Further, the median package offered to UG (4-year) and PG (2-year) students during Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University placements 2022 was the same and the amount stood at INR 2.50 LPA . Firefox, Nestle, and Coca-Cola were some of the leading companies that were part of SGGSWU placements in recent years.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University?
faqs.answer: Out of 28 UG (4-year) graduates, 4 were placed during 2022 placements. Further, 27 out of 34 PG (2-year) students were placed. Check the complete insights related to Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University placements 2022 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2022) Total students (UG-4 year) 28 Students placed (UG-4 year) 4 Median package (UG-4 year) INR 2.50 LPA Total students (PG-2 year) 34 Students placed (PG-2 year) 27 Median package (PG-2 year) INR 2.50 LPA NOTE: The aforementioned data is fetched from the NIRF report 2023.

faqs.question: What is the average package at Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University?
faqs.answer: The SGGSWU average package is yet to be released officially. However, the NIRF report 2023 includes the 2022 median package, which is as follows: Course Median Package (2022) UG (4-year) INR 2.50 LPA PG (2-year) INR 2.50 LPA

hostel_campus.college_name: Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Teachers don't teach. No datesheet provided on time. Only projects files were given to complete.
reviews.review_text: Our university environment is good. It features a big ground with a lot of greenery and trees everywhere. University's size is quite large, and it even has a temple inside. Computer labs are available, and canteens are also present, where many students gather with their partners.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best university in the state of Punjab.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities were there, such as delicious food with a great seating area, Wi-Fi, electricity, a library with a quiet environment, medical facilities with professional staff, clean surroundings, clean restrooms, sports facilities, and a screen time area also available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sri Guru Granth Sahib World University.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very pleasant. You will be totally safe here, and it gives you a positive vibe to study harder. Facilities like Wi-Fi, labs and classrooms are good. Students get a lot of new opportunities every day to develop their skills through extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: A college where you can do anything what you want with no restriction.
reviews.review_text: The university campus is very good and all the teachers are very friendly they always take care of their poor students. Wi-Fi is almost free for every student. Students can check what they want to see in the internet either they have no internet connection. The hostel is very neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: The college is average in all the aspects.
reviews.review_text: The college provides well-furnished infrastructure. They have invested so much of money towards infrastructure about 400cr. The studies of the college are inadequate. The hostel is excellent like 5-star hotels; you must visit the hostel.
